SEARCH
Package io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa.client.azure

Class AzureAsyncClientImpl

java.lang.Object
io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa.client.azure.AzureAsyncClientImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BlobStorageAsyncClient
public class AzureAsyncClientImpl extends Object implements BlobStorageAsyncClient

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<Boolean>
    blobExists(String bucketName, String blobKey)
    Returns whether the blob exists.
    CompletableFuture<Boolean>
    bucketExists(String bucketName)
    Returns whether the bucket/container exists.
    CompletableFuture<String>
    copyBlob(String sourceBucketName, String sourceBlobKey, String destinationBucketName, String destinationBlobKey)
    Copies a blob to another bucket/key and returns the ETag of the new blob when the provider exposes one.
    CompletableFuture<String>
    createBlob(String bucketName, Blob blob)
    Creates or overwrites a blob using the key and content stored in the given Blob.
    CompletableFuture<String>
    createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, Path sourceFile)
    Creates or overwrites a blob from a local file.
    CompletableFuture<String>
    createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, Path sourceFile, BlobWriteOptions options)
    Creates or overwrites a blob from a local file, applying optional write metadata such as content encoding and user metadata.
    CompletableFuture<String>
    createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, Flow.Publisher<ByteBuffer> content, long contentLength, BlobWriteOptions options)
    Creates or overwrites a blob from a publisher with a known content length.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    createBucket(Bucket bucket)
    Creates a bucket/container.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    deleteBlobIfExists(String bucketName, String blobKey)
    Deletes the blob when it exists and does not fail when it is already missing.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    deleteBucket(String bucketName)
    Deletes the bucket/container.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    deleteBucketIfExists(String bucketName)
    Deletes the bucket/container when it exists and does not fail when it is already missing.
    URL
    generateGetUrl(String bucket, String objectKey, Duration expiry)
    Generates a temporary URL for downloading a blob.
    URL
    generatePutUrl(String bucket, String objectKey, Duration expiry)
    Generates a temporary URL for uploading a blob.
    CompletableFuture<Blob>
    getBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey)
    Returns the blob content and metadata.
    CompletableFuture<Blob>
    getBlobMetadata(String bucketName, String blobKey)
    Returns blob metadata without loading the content into memory.
    CompletableFuture<byte[]>
    getByteRange(String bucketName, String blobKey, long startInclusive, long endInclusive)
    Returns the inclusive byte range from the blob content.
    Provider
    getProvider()
    Returns the underlying cloud provider for this client.
    CompletableFuture<List<Bucket>>
    listAllBuckets()
    Returns all buckets/containers by repeatedly loading pages until exhaustion.
    CompletableFuture<ListingPage<Blob>>
    listBlobs(String bucketName, String prefix, PageRequest request)
    Returns a single page of blobs in the given bucket/container.
    CompletableFuture<ListingPage<Bucket>>
    listBuckets(PageRequest request)
    Returns a single page of buckets/containers.
    Flow.Publisher<ByteBuffer>
    openBlobStream(String bucketName, String blobKey)
    Opens a publisher that emits the blob content as byte buffers.
    <T> T
    unwrap(Class<T> nativeType)
    Returns the native SDK client when it matches the requested type.

  • Constructor Details

    • AzureAsyncClientImpl

      public AzureAsyncClientImpl(com.azure.storage.blob.BlobServiceAsyncClient client)

  • Method Details

    • getProvider

      public Provider getProvider()
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Returns the underlying cloud provider for this client.
      Specified by:
      getProvider in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • unwrap

      public <T> T unwrap(Class<T> nativeType)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Returns the native SDK client when it matches the requested type.

      This can be used to access provider-specific features that are outside the UBSA abstraction.

      Supported client types are AWS S3AsyncClient, Azure BlobServiceAsyncClient, and GCP Storage.

      Specified by:
      unwrap in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Returns:
      the native client, or null when the requested type does not match

    • bucketExists

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> bucketExists(String bucketName)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Returns whether the bucket/container exists.
      Specified by:
      bucketExists in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • getBlob

      public CompletableFuture<Blob> getBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Returns the blob content and metadata.
      Specified by:
      getBlob in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • getBlobMetadata

      public CompletableFuture<Blob> getBlobMetadata(String bucketName, String blobKey)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Returns blob metadata without loading the content into memory.

      The returned Blob has null content.

      Specified by:
      getBlobMetadata in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • openBlobStream

      public Flow.Publisher<ByteBuffer> openBlobStream(String bucketName, String blobKey)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Opens a publisher that emits the blob content as byte buffers.
      Specified by:
      openBlobStream in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • blobExists

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> blobExists(String bucketName, String blobKey)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Returns whether the blob exists.
      Specified by:
      blobExists in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • createBlob

      public CompletableFuture<String> createBlob(String bucketName, Blob blob)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Creates or overwrites a blob using the key and content stored in the given Blob.

      If Blob.getContent() is null, an empty blob is created.

      Specified by:
      createBlob in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • createBlob

      public CompletableFuture<String> createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, Path sourceFile)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Creates or overwrites a blob from a local file.
      Specified by:
      createBlob in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • createBlob

      public CompletableFuture<String> createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, Path sourceFile, BlobWriteOptions options)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Creates or overwrites a blob from a local file, applying optional write metadata such as content encoding and user metadata.
      Specified by:
      createBlob in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • createBlob

      public CompletableFuture<String> createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, Flow.Publisher<ByteBuffer> content, long contentLength, BlobWriteOptions options)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Creates or overwrites a blob from a publisher with a known content length.
      Specified by:
      createBlob in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • deleteBlobIfExists

      public CompletableFuture<Void> deleteBlobIfExists(String bucketName, String blobKey)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Deletes the blob when it exists and does not fail when it is already missing.
      Specified by:

    • copyBlob

      public CompletableFuture<String> copyBlob(String sourceBucketName, String sourceBlobKey, String destinationBucketName, String destinationBlobKey)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Copies a blob to another bucket/key and returns the ETag of the new blob when the provider exposes one.
      Specified by:
      copyBlob in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • listBuckets

      public CompletableFuture<ListingPage<Bucket>> listBuckets(PageRequest request)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Returns a single page of buckets/containers.

      If request is null, the first page is requested with provider defaults.

      Specified by:
      listBuckets in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • listBlobs

      public CompletableFuture<ListingPage<Blob>> listBlobs(String bucketName, String prefix, PageRequest request)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Returns a single page of blobs in the given bucket/container.

      If prefix is non-blank, only matching blob keys are returned. If request is null, the first page is requested with provider defaults.

      Specified by:
      listBlobs in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

    • listAllBuckets

      public CompletableFuture<List<Bucket>> listAllBuckets()
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Returns all buckets/containers by repeatedly loading pages until exhaustion.
      Specified by:
      listAllBuckets in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient

      public CompletableFuture<Void> createBucket(Bucket bucket)
      Description copied from interface: BlobStorageAsyncClient
      Creates a bucket/container.
      Specified by:
      createBucket in interface BlobStorageAsyncClient
